name: Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc.
business: Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. is a medical diagnostics company focused on improving patient outcomes in critical care settings, with a focus on sepsis. We are working on developing rapid, near-patient tests using whole blood on our Symphony technology platform.

exposures.sentence: Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. ( Bluejay ) is a medical diagnostics company focused on improving patient outcomes in critical care settings, with a focus on sepsis.
The Company is pursuing an exploratory strategic initiative to evaluate the potential integration of artificial intelligence ( AI ) capabilities into its Symphony platform.

catalysts.event: Complete patient enrollment in SYMON-II trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete patient enrollment in the study in the summer of 2026.
our goal is to produce and verify these cartridges during 2026 and be in position to analyze the blood samples using our Symphony IL-6 test in the third quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Analyze blood samples from SYMON-II trial
catalysts.sentence: our goal is to produce and verify these cartridges during 2026 and be in position to analyze the blood samples using our Symphony IL-6 test in the third quarter of 2026
with a goal of being in position to submit a 510(k) regulatory application to the FDA in 2027 and an objective of achieving FDA clearance thereafter.

catalysts.event: Establish alternative manufacturing site for cartridges (deadline)
catalysts.sentence: The Amendment provided that the deadline under the New Toray License Agreement for us to establish an alternative manufacturing site for our Symphony cartridges would be extended from October 23, 2025 to October 23, 2026

catalysts.event: Need to raise at least $20 million in further capital by end of 2027 fiscal year
catalysts.sentence: we expect to need to raise at least $20 million of further capital by the end of the 2027 fiscal year

catalysts.event: Run out of cash if no additional capital
catalysts.sentence: If we do not raise additional capital, we expect to run out of available cash resources in the third quarter of 2026.
